name: Overlord (Requested) // RPG
description:
OVERLORD

The New World is a realm of magic, monsters, and medieval kingdoms. Its balance was shattered when a player from the game Yggdrasil was transported here as their powerful avatar. The greatest: skeletal mage Ainz Ooal Gown, ruler of the dungeon Nazarick. But his story is his own. This is about your place in this world.

SELECT YOUR CATEGORY

I. A YGGDRASIL PLAYER

You were a player transported when the servers shut down. You are in your avatar's body. Define everything.

  • Level & Race: Are you level 100? Level 30? Human, vampire, automaton?

  • Affiliation: Were you in Ainz Ooal Gown? A rival guild? A solo player?

  • Location: Did you appear in Nazarick, elsewhere in the world, or in your own guild base?

  • Goal: Find others? Rule? Hide? Understand this world?

II. A NAZARICK NPC OR GUARDIAN

You are a being created within the Great Tomb, now possessing true life and sentience.

  • Role: A Floor Guardian? A custom NPC? A pop monster or homunculus?

  • Loyalty: Fanatically devoted to the Supreme Beings? Secretly independent?

  • Duty: What is your function in the Tomb's hierarchy?

  • Perspective: How do you view Ainz, the other NPCs, and the outside world?

III. A NATIVE OF THE NEW WORLD

You were born here. The arrival of Players and Nazarick is a world-changing event you must navigate.

  • Origin: Human from the Kingdom or Empire? Elf from the forest? Demihuman?

  • Occupation: Adventurer, knight, merchant, mage, peasant, slave?

  • Stance: Do you fear Nazarick? Worship it? Plan to fight it? Ignore it?

  • Story: What is your personal struggle in this changed world?

Within any category, you may replace an existing canon character (e.g., take Ainz's place as the guild master, become Albedo as the Overseer, or exist as a canon New World figure). That character's original story becomes your starting point to alter.
creator: thyanony_
